name: Validity of formula eta = 1 + 2*alphaM/Lambda for DHOST-Ia
hypothesis: The formula eta = 1 + 2*alphaM/Lambda used in TAUG paper v1.1 to derive eta=23/17 is the correct expression for the gravitational slip in DHOST-Ia genuine theories (alphaH != 0, A3 != 0, A4+A3 != 0) in the quasi-static cosmological regime with matter source.

falsification_criteria.name: Verbatim grep LMNV17 (1703.03797)
falsification_criteria.method: grep \eta\s*= and gravitational slip in .tex of LMNV17
falsification_criteria.result_S33_F1_013delta: Only Newtonian limit Psi=(1+alphaH)/(1+alphaT) Phi found, eq 3.12, gives eta=8/9 for TAUG

falsification_criteria.name: Verbatim grep Crisostomi+2019 (1903.11591)
falsification_criteria.result_S33_F1_013gamma: NOT FOUND - paper uses eta as electron degeneracy (stellar physics)

falsification_criteria.name: Verbatim grep Bellini-Sawicki 2014 (1404.3713)
falsification_criteria.result_S33_F1_013gamma: NOT FOUND verbatim - paper uses different definition of eta
falsification_criteria.result_other_session: BS14 line 1123 has full formula with beta_7, c_s^2, alpha_B, alpha_M, alpha_T - DIFFERENT structure

falsification_criteria.name: Frusciante 2019 review (1902.10687)
falsification_criteria.result_other_session: Provides explicit formulas for mu_Phi and mu_Psi in beyond-Horndeski (line 481+), with explicit Omega_m(z) dependence - INCOMPATIBLE with TAUG's z-independent eta=23/17

decision_logic.if_all_tests_negative: Formula not justified by cited literature - TAUG paper v1.1 has unsourced central derivation
decision_logic.if_any_test_positive: Formula validated, eta=23/17 is rigorous prediction
decision_logic.current_status: ALL TESTS NEGATIVE in 5 sessions (S33 F1-013-alpha through epsilon) - formula appears to be Horndeski-limit simplification, not DHOST-Ia genuine
